name: tachyon-cli
description: Tachyon CLI workflow skill for inspecting Cloud Apps, builds, deployments, and logs.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect Tachyon Cloud Apps and builds with the CLI.
interface.longDescription: Use the Tachyon CLI to inspect Cloud Apps, build status, deployments, build logs, auth profiles, and live Cloud App failures while redacting secrets from output.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the Tachyon CLI skill to inspect the latest Cloud App build status and summarize the result.
